log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, compressed with UPX, and has been detected as a spreader and a persistence threat. I should investigate the network activity to see if it communicates with any C2 serv

The sample does not appear to have any network activity, which is unusual for a spreader and persistence threat. I should investigate the registry changes to see if it attempts to persist in the syste
The sample attempts to persist in the system by setting a value in the Run registry key. I should investigate the dropped files to see if it drops any suspicious files.
The sample drops four files, including two instances of CTS.exe and two other executables. I should investigate the process activity to see if it spawns any suspicious processes.
The sample spawns two processes, including one instance of CTS.exe, and loads several cryptographic modules. I should investigate the CAPA behaviors to see if it exhibits any suspicious behavior.
The sample exhibits a wide range of behaviors, including encryption, persistence, and process creation. I should form a hypothesis about its tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs).
